suggestions.title: Fix today’s rotation closing form before you submit the PDF
suggestions.description: You compiled `课题轮转结题申请.tex` today, but it still carries another student’s name, a different project title, and impossible dates. Codex can align the LaTeX form with your `rotation.md` content and regenerate a clean submission PDF.
suggestions.prompt: Please fix the rotation closing package in this project. Use `rotation.md` as the source of truth, update `课题轮转结题申请.tex` so the student/project/mentor/dates/content all match the SOLM work, remove the leftover mismatched information, and leave me with a polished PDF-ready form plus a short list of what you changed.

suggestions.title: Turn the SOLM proposal files into one consistent funding packet
suggestions.description: This folder has overlapping proposal artifacts: `docs.md`, `科研立项申请表-自由探索项目-万佳欣.md`, budget spreadsheets, and a June 3 budget report docx. Codex can reconcile the numbers, dates, and wording into one internally consistent packet so you are not manually diffing admin documents.
suggestions.prompt: Please audit the proposal materials in this project for consistency. Compare `docs.md`, `科研立项申请表-自由探索项目-万佳欣.md`, the budget-related files, and the recent report documents, then produce a concise inconsistency report and update the markdown source(s) to a single consistent version of the SOLM funding application with aligned dates, milestones, budget, and prior-results claims.

suggestions.title: Convert your existing SOLM results into the required one-page appendix
suggestions.description: The proposal asks for prior成果说明, and this repo already contains the exact evidence: experimental tables in `rotation.md`, proposal claims in `docs.md`, and ICML-era figures under `icml2026/figures`. Codex can compress that into a submission-ready appendix instead of making you rewrite it by hand.
suggestions.prompt: Please create a polished one-page prior-results appendix for the SOLM application using the evidence already in this project. Pull the strongest validated claims, tables, and figures from `rotation.md`, `docs.md`, and `icml2026/figures`, write it in the tone of an academic admin attachment, and leave the result as a markdown source I can reuse in the application packet.
